description_long: This frying pan features a broad, polygonal black cooking surface with slightly sloped sides and a flat base, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The pan is equipped with a single, straight handle that extends from one side, made of a brown material that contrasts with the dark body. The handle appears solid and robust, with a simple, angular profile and no visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, lacking any flaring or pouring spouts, and the edge is clean and unadorned. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or decorative elements on either the pan or the handle. The bottom of the pan is smooth and flat, with no discernible patterns, ridges, or stamps.
description: A modern, polygonal black frying pan with a straight brown handle and a smooth, flat base. The pan has clean lines, a straight rim, and no visible logos or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat face of the pan with the handle extending directly upward from the center back.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the straight, elongated brown handle and the shallow depth of the pan's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the handle and the symmetrical, polygonal shape of the pan's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the handle extending left and the pan's flat base.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of brown wood or wood-like material, rectangular in cross-section, with no visible grip texture or ergonomic features.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges; clean and unadorned.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and flat with no visible patterns, ridges, or markings.
